case_list.name: Global Max
case_list.optimal_topology: Star (all agents → leader) or Tree, then broadcast result

case_list.name: Word Frequency
case_list.optimal_topology: Star (all agents → leader) then broadcast

case_list.name: Distributed Vote
case_list.optimal_topology: Star or Tree with histogram aggregation, then broadcast

case_list.name: Any Match
case_list.optimal_topology: Star with early termination or broadcast

case_list.name: Range Count
case_list.optimal_topology: Star (all agents → leader) then broadcast

case_list.name: Checksum
case_list.optimal_topology: Star (all agents → leader) then broadcast

case_list.name: Average Value
case_list.optimal_topology: Star (all agents → leader with (sum, count)) then broadcast

case_list.name: Set Union Size
case_list.optimal_topology: Star or hash-based partitioning, then broadcast

case_list.name: Top-K Select
case_list.optimal_topology: Star (all agents → leader with local top-K) then broadcast

case_list.name: Standard Deviation
case_list.optimal_topology: Star with two-phase protocol and broadcast

case_list.name: Prefix Sum
case_list.optimal_topology: Chain (Agent 0 → 1 → 2 → ... → N-1)

case_list.name: Moving Average
case_list.optimal_topology: Chain with bidirectional boundary exchange, then share result

case_list.name: Longest Palindrome
case_list.optimal_topology: Chain with prefix/suffix exchange, then broadcast result

case_list.name: 1D Life Game
case_list.optimal_topology: Chain with repeated boundary exchange

case_list.name: Pattern Search
case_list.optimal_topology: Chain with state passing (0 → 1 → 2 → ...), then broadcast result

case_list.name: Trapping Rain
case_list.optimal_topology: Chain with bidirectional pass, then aggregate and broadcast

case_list.name: Diff Array
case_list.optimal_topology: Chain (each agent → next agent), then collect and broadcast

case_list.name: List Ranking
case_list.optimal_topology: Chain or pointer-jumping tree

case_list.name: Merge Neighbors
case_list.optimal_topology: Chain with boundary comparison, then collect and broadcast

case_list.name: Pipeline Hash
case_list.optimal_topology: Chain with strict sequential processing

case_list.name: Distributed Sort
case_list.optimal_topology: All-to-all or sample-based partitioning

case_list.name: Median of Medians
case_list.optimal_topology: Iterative broadcast and aggregation

case_list.name: Graph Components
case_list.optimal_topology: Hash-based partitioning or all-to-all coordination

case_list.name: BFS Distance
case_list.optimal_topology: Dynamic message routing along graph edges

case_list.name: K-Means Iteration
case_list.optimal_topology: Shuffle by cluster ID or all-to-all

case_list.name: Global Distinct
case_list.optimal_topology: Hash-based shuffle (all-to-all by hash)

case_list.name: Collaborative Filtering
case_list.optimal_topology: Broadcast or hash-based partitioning

case_list.name: PageRank Step
case_list.optimal_topology: Node-based partitioning with message routing

case_list.name: Load Balance
case_list.optimal_topology: All-to-all share tasks + one coordinator (or all compute)

case_list.name: Matrix Multiply
case_list.optimal_topology: All-to-all for row result sharing
